meaning: n.通行证,许可证,执照v.许可,允许,准许
examples: Is your work permit in order?
The work permit is not renewable.
The permit runs for three months.
Current permit-holders include Sir Paul McCartney, Steven Spielberg and Lloyd Blankfein, chief executive of Goldman Sachs.
More than 82% of companies that offer the popular workplace retirement plan permit 401(k) loans.
